name: cloud-skills
description: Multi-cloud CLI plugins for Claude Code — manage Hetzner, AWS, Azure, GCP, and Scaleway through their official command-line tools. Install one provider or all of them.

plugins.name: hcloud
plugins.description: Hetzner Cloud CLI skills, commands, and safety hooks — servers, networking, storage, DNS, security, plus 260+ bundled reference pages

plugins.name: aws
plugins.description: AWS CLI skills and safety hooks — authentication, EC2 compute lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: azure
plugins.description: Azure CLI (az) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Virtual Machine lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: gcp
plugins.description: Google Cloud CLI (gcloud) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Compute Engine instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: scaleway
plugins.description: Scaleway CLI (scw) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: contabo
plugins.description: Contabo CLI (cntb) skills and safety hooks — OAuth2 authentication, VPS/VDS instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: digitalocean
plugins.description: DigitalOcean CLI (doctl) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Droplet lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: linode
plugins.description: Linode / Akamai CLI (linode-cli) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Linode instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: vultr
plugins.description: Vultr CLI (vultr-cli) skills and safety hooks — authentication, instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: ovh
plugins.description: OVHcloud Public Cloud skills and safety hooks (OpenStack-based) — openstack auth, instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command

plugins.name: oracle
plugins.description: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure CLI (oci) skills and safety hooks — authentication, Compute instance lifecycle, and an infrastructure status command
